item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Retro tech that's anomalous is great, Atari Arcadia is great, and this skip is pretty good. It's not the greatest execution on the theme of anomalous video games but it's good enough to earn +1 from me.

fish golf

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: interesting read. i think im missing some things here and there, but i usually am with any article. mostly what i get from this is i need to read more atari arcadia stuff. nice job with the audio at the end too, clever use of a clip like that. consider this an upvote from me

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It took me a second to completely understand, but it's a neat article! Maybe change around some grammar stuff (maybe get rid of the 'totally' near the end and replace it with completely) and you should be good.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
To be honest, I think the second and third footnotes are unnecessary. Would probably fit better as parentheticals.

Otherwise, +1, because I love a good 'old video game' skip.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I never LOVED lists of mass production stuff being SCPs, but the sheer irregularity (in the sense of lack of consistent categorization/regulation at the time) of pre-Crash videogames is absolutely ripe for weirdness and it's a Very Roget Sort Of Inspiration.

The effect of this SCP is really really bizarre. It has nothing to do with the game itself, it's a classic effect on a classic item - something esoteric (in this case, old technology) with a Bad Stuff Happens effect (destruction of hearing and followup with destruction of part of the brain). I don't love the flag, like T Rutherford above said. Feels kind of weak and tacked on, and made me kind of squint. Doesn't connect to the rest of the leadup.

Beyond the list of Other Games added below I think the warning is the weakest part of the SCP. But overall? I really like it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The audio clip at the end was a great, and unorthodox climax to the "corruption" elements within the article. My only gripe is the "DOCUMENTATION FLAGGED FOR ANOMALOUS MEDIA CONTAGION… PLEASE STAND BY" felt a bit weak given the context. A terminal shutdown, security dispatch, any of the old cliches would have felt more appropriate to the level of escalation. Still, easy +1.

I might have an idea for Bloccom too.

item.title: fish golf
item.content:encoded: God I'm so happy this terrible title got turned into a real thing.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Image Credits

Image with modifications by Deadly Bread

Audio

Both licensed under Creative Commons

Other images used with permission of Leonard Herman

Thanks to Hippo. HammerMaiden, Cerastes, ch00bakka, rattles, and everyone else who gave this a read. Let me know if I forgot ya and I'll credit you here.

This has been my favorite Arcadia SCP to write thus far.

Titles at the end are open for anyone to use!
